titles.en: The Reward of Whoever Goes on the Hajj Pilgrimage Twice
The Reward of Whoever Goes on the Hajj Pilgrimage Twice

segments: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله، عن محمد بن الحسين ابن أبي الخطاب، عن الحجال، عن صفوان بن يحيى، عن صفوان بن مهران الجمال، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: من حج حجتين لم يزل في خير حتى يموت
arabic.text: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله، عن محمد بن الحسين ابن أبي الخطاب، عن الحجال، عن صفوان بن يحيى، عن صفوان بن مهران الجمال، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: من حج حجتين لم يزل في خير حتى يموت

segments: 2-81 (The compiler of the book narrated) that his father - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Sa’ed ibn Abdullah quoted Muhammad ibn al-Hussein ibn Abil Khat’tab, on the authority of Al-Hijal, on the authority of Safvan ibn Yahya, on the authority of Safvan ibn Mihran al-Jamal, on the authority of Aba Abdullah as-Sadiq (MGB), “Whoever goes on the Hajj pilgrimage twice would always be in good conditions until he dies.”
en.dr-ali-peiravi.text: 2-81 (The compiler of the book narrated) that his father - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Sa’ed ibn Abdullah quoted Muhammad ibn al-Hussein ibn Abil Khat’tab, on the authority of Al-Hijal, on the authority of Safvan ibn Yahya, on the authority of Safvan ibn Mihran al-Jamal, on the authority of Aba Abdullah as-Sadiq (MGB), “Whoever goes on the Hajj pilgrimage twice would always be in good conditions until he dies.”

narratorChain.raw: 2-81 حدثنا أبي رضي الله عنه قال
